inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: The lump sum amount you invest initially.

inputs.label: Monthly Contribution
inputs.businessContext: The fixed amount you invest each month.

inputs.label: Expected Annual Return Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annualized return rate of the mutual fund.

inputs.label: Investment Period
inputs.businessContext: Number of years you plan to stay invested.

inputs.label: Expected Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected average annual inflation rate to adjust future value.

formulas.futureValue: initialInvestment * Math.pow(1 + annualReturnRate/100/12, investmentPeriod*12) + monthlyContribution * ( (Math.pow(1 + annualReturnRate/100/12, investmentPeriod*12) - 1) / (annualReturnRate/100/12) )
